conditions_legend.S: Licensee must wear corrective lenses at all times
conditions_legend.1: May only drive a vehicle fitted with a breath alcohol interlock device
conditions_legend.2: Must not drive a vehicle if the licencee has a blood alcohol concentration of 0.02 g/100ml or more

back.transport_notice: Change of address must be advised within 14 days by phoning the RTA Customer Service Centre on 13 22 81
